message:
feat: add landing page at root with dark terminal aesthetic

- Landing page shown at `/` when logged out, redirects to `/app` when logged in
- Dashboard moved to `/app` route (requires auth)
- README-style design with monospace font, tabs for integrations
- Claude Code and Codex setup instructions, coming soon for others
- 🔮 emoji as logo
